query: INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, videoUrl, readingMaterial, assignment, lessonOrder) SELECT id, 'Test-Taking Strategies and Time Management', 'Learn proven strategies for managing time during the GED test, including pacing techniques and question prioritization.', 'https://example.com/video/test-strategies', 'Test-Taking Strategies Guide', 'Practice timed questions', 19 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Test-Taking Strategies and Time Management', 'Master time management techniques specific to the Math section, including calculator use and problem-solving shortcuts.', 'https://example.com/video/math-strategies', 'Math Test-Taking Guide', 'Complete timed math problems', 19 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Test-Taking Strategies and Time Management', 'Develop strategies for reading and analyzing science passages efficiently under time pressure.', 'https://example.com/video/science-strategies', 'Science Test-Taking Guide', 'Practice science questions', 19 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Test-Taking Strategies and Time Management', 'Learn techniques for analyzing documents and answering social studies questions quickly and accurately.', 'https://example.com/video/ss-strategies', 'Social Studies Test-Taking Guide', 'Practice social studies questions', 19 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Stress Management and Exam Preparation', 'Develop strategies to manage test anxiety and prepare mentally for exam day.', 'https://example.com/video/stress-management', 'Exam Preparation Guide', 'Create a study plan', 20 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Stress Management and Exam Preparation', 'Learn techniques to stay calm and focused during the Math test.', 'https://example.com/video/math-stress', 'Math Exam Preparation Guide', 'Practice under test conditions', 20 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Stress Management and Exam Preparation', 'Prepare mentally and physically for the Science test with proven stress-reduction techniques.', 'https://example.com/video/science-stress', 'Science Exam Preparation Guide', 'Review key concepts', 20 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Stress Management and Exam Preparation', 'Master exam day preparation and stress management for the Social Studies test.', 'https://example.com/video/ss-stress', 'Social Studies Exam Preparation Guide', 'Final review and practice', 20 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL';
